name: TenkaCloud Starter Event
shortDescription: TenkaCloud を初めて運用する organizer 向けの 'これ流せば 1 イベント' プリセット。 Challenge 1 問 (フラグ提出の体験) + Battle 2 問 (リアルタイム稼働率対戦) = 3 問で 60〜90 分に収まる。
description:
Commercially credible starter bundle for TenkaCloud's first-time organizers.

Designed around the 'one CCoE/JAWS-UG meetup slot' shape: 60 minutes if teams move fast, 90 minutes if you keep one Battle running while teams attempt the Challenge in parallel. All three problems are status=ready and have been deployed at least once in a real AWS account.

Flow recommendation:
  1. (5 min) Brief teams on the platform + open the Participant Portal.
  2. (15 min) Challenge first: hello-world. Verifies every team's portal + deploy chain works end-to-end. The story onboards them to the the previous SRE / the CTO fiction.
  3. (45-60 min) Battles in parallel: hello-world-battle (uptime tutorial) -> microservice-migration-battle (the headline migration race) OR security-battle-royale (the headline incident-response).
  4. (5 min) Leaderboard recap + close.

Problem mix: Challenge for the 'I solved a thing' feeling, Battle for the visible head-to-head competition. Keep one of the headline Battles (microservice-migration-battle / security-battle-royale) for the demo punchline so audience members see the leaderboard move in real time.
learningObjectives: Run TenkaCloud's deploy → flag-submission → score loop once per team (= sanity check the platform)
Practice the Battle uptime probe-and-recover dynamic with one warm-up problem
Demo a headline Battle (microservice migration or incident response) for the audience

en.name: TenkaCloud Starter Event
en.shortDescription: Drop-in preset for first-time TenkaCloud organizers. 1 Challenge (flag-submission warmup) + 2 Battles (real-time uptime competition) = 3 problems that fit a 60-90 minute slot.
